name: WoS XML to BigQuery Pipeline
description: Production-ready Dataflow pipeline for processing Web of Science XML data into BigQuery

parameters.name: input_pattern
parameters.label: Input XML File Pattern
parameters.helpText: GCS pattern for input XML files (e.g., gs://bucket/path/*.xml)

parameters.name: config_path
parameters.label: Configuration File Path
parameters.helpText: GCS path to wos_config.xml configuration file

parameters.name: bq_dataset
parameters.label: BigQuery Dataset
parameters.helpText: Target BigQuery dataset (format: project:dataset or dataset)

parameters.name: dlq_bucket
parameters.label: Dead Letter Queue Bucket
parameters.helpText: GCS bucket name for failed records (without gs:// prefix)

parameters.name: record_tag
parameters.label: XML Record Tag
parameters.helpText: XML tag name that defines a single record

parameters.name: id_tag
parameters.label: XML ID Tag
parameters.helpText: XML tag name containing the unique identifier

parameters.name: namespace
parameters.label: XML Namespace
parameters.helpText: XML namespace URI (leave empty if no namespace)

parameters.name: bq_write_disposition
parameters.label: BigQuery Write Disposition
parameters.helpText: How to handle existing data in BigQuery tables
